purpose: How to update Academy current scene state after a ChatGPT answer.
allowed_scene_state_updates: time advancement if scene explicitly passed time
scheduled/delayed to active when beat is reached

add_only_if: character is contacted by phone/message and becomes active
scene contract included delayed/conditional arrival and condition is met
do_not_add_if: character is important in canon but absent
assistant wants dramatic entrance without setup
they are only in relationship data
they are scheduled later but current beat has not reached them
remove_if: POV leaves and no contact remains

time_rules.medium_step: tens of minutes for summarized travel/training/meal
time_rules.large_step: hours/days only if player requested skip or scene contract permits
time_rules.forbidden: do not skip important NPC answer/question without offering choice

location_rules.privacy_change: location changes NPC presence and next-turn character loading
